data.content: Changed buildWorkflowStateCommand in memory-manager-commands.ts to emit `kno next <id> --actor-kind agent` for knots instead of `kno update <id> --status <state>`. Beads path unchanged. Deduplicated progression commands in terminal-manager.ts. Tests updated. All quality gates pass (lint, tsc, 1673 tests). Commit 7f6df9d.
